mapper.select: SELECT DISTINCT m.perms FROM sys_menu m INNER JOIN sys_role_menu rm ON rm.menu_id = m.menu_id INNER JOIN sys_user_role ur ON ur.role_id = rm.role_id WHERE ur.user_id = #{userId} AND m.status = '0' AND m.deleted = 0 AND m.perms != ''

SELECT menu_id, menu_name, parent_id, order_num, path, component, perms, menu_type, visible, status, icon FROM sys_menu WHERE menu_type IN ('M', 'C') AND status = '0' AND visible = '0' AND deleted = 0 ORDER BY parent_id, order_num

SELECT DISTINCT m.menu_id, m.menu_name, m.parent_id, m.order_num, m.path, m.component, m.perms, m.menu_type, m.visible, m.status, m.icon FROM sys_menu m INNER JOIN sys_role_menu rm ON rm.menu_id = m.menu_id INNER JOIN sys_user_role ur ON ur.role_id = rm.role_id WHERE ur.user_id = #{userId} AND m.menu_type IN ('M', 'C') AND m.status = '0' AND m.visible = '0' AND m.deleted = 0 ORDER BY m.parent_id, m.order_num
